title: Cochlospermum orinocense
taxonomy: Cochlospermum orinocense is classified within the family Cochlospermaceae. This family is a small group of flowering plants commonly known as the cochlospermum family. The Cochlospermaceae family is part of the order Malvales. Cochlospermum orinocense is further classified into the genus Cochlospermum and the species C. orinocense. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants.
